name: Zanzibar Premium Booking Engine
description: High-ticket booking engine for luxury tourism, fishing trips, and excursions. Includes multilingual support, WhatsApp integration, and international payments.

CRI.target_users: International luxury travelers and local operators
CRI.business_outcome: Automated high-ticket reservations with instant payment and WhatsApp confirmation
CRI.kill_switch: Payment API failure or critical availability drift

acceptance_criteria: AC-BOOKING-01: User can select date/time and pay in under 3 minutes on mobile
AC-INT-01: Automated WhatsApp confirmation sent to both guest and operator after payment
AC-UX-01: Luxury feeling with Playfair Display typography and gold/teal accents
AC-GLOBAL-01: Content available in English, Swedish, and Swahili
